summary: The CI job 'Run prettier' failed because yarn prettier-check exited with code 1 due to formatting inconsistencies in two files; the job message instructs running yarn prettier-all to fix them.
root_cause: Two files contain code formatting that does not conform to the project's Prettier configuration, causing `yarn prettier-check` to fail with exit code 1.

evidence.quote: Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: CI output explicitly instructs to run yarn prettier-all to fix formatting and add the changes.
Shows the failing command that checks formatting.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: Indicates the prettier-check command failed, causing the job to fail.
One of the two files reported as having formatting inconsistencies.
The other file reported as having formatting inconsistencies.
Final CI failure message confirming the job failed due to the exit code from prettier-check.

suggested_fix: Run yarn prettier-all locally or in CI to reformat the repository, review the changes (including the two listed files), and add the updated files to your commit before pushing.
